meta.note: First recorded run. memory/portfolio_log.json and scripts/premarket-research.js did not exist in this repo (no git history for either) — this repo is 'aurora-ring', a Shopify ring-product marketing site, not a trading-bot repo. Substituted live IBKR MCP tools (get_account_positions, get_account_summary, get_price_snapshot, get_price_history, get_pa_performance_all_periods, get_account_orders) for the missing local script. Verified zero live/queued orders before and during this run — read-only throughout.

positions.catalyst: Phase 3 REGAL trial (galinpepimut-S, AML maintenance) at 78/80 pre-specified events as of May 11 2026 8-K; unblinding + topline data triggered at 80th event. No readout confirmed yet as of this run.
positions.news_sentiment: bullish momentum / high anticipation — stock up sharply (Simply Wall St cites +62.7% move) into the approaching unblinding; large volume spikes July 1

positions.catalyst: $25B senior notes offering priced June 23 2026 (5.35%-6.65% coupons, 2031-2056 maturities), settled June 26; stock fell 7.8% July 1 to $157.54 on lockup/dilution overhang. First insider lockup tranche expected ~Aug 6 2026 (staggered through Dec 8 2026, largest single tranche ~late Oct/Nov tied to Q3 earnings).
positions.news_sentiment: mixed — bond demand reportedly strong (~$89B demand per one source) but lockup overhang pressuring price; partial recovery from July 1 close to ~$160.95

watchlist_not_held.note: Not currently a live position (confirmed via get_account_positions). FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for CTx-1301 (ADHD) citing CMC issues, no efficacy/safety concerns; original PDUFA was May 31 2026. Company now in CMC-driven resubmission process, ~$30M cash. No imminent PDUFA.

flags: SLS is ~70.6% of gross position value / ~68% of NAV — far above the 35% NAV trim threshold — heading into a binary Phase 3 unblinding catalyst. Concentration + binary risk compounding.
No live or queued orders on the account at time of research (get_account_orders returned empty) — confirms zero trades placed.
Automation infrastructure (memory/portfolio_log.json, scripts/premarket-research.js) was missing from this repo; live IBKR MCP data used instead this run.
